/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/MineClone.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/MineClone.dir/src/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MineClone.dir/src/configShader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MineClone.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MineClone.dir/src/screen.cpp.o -o MineClone  libglad.a /usr/lib/libSDL2-2.0.so.0.3200.64 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
